Interface ITemporalObservationsTable2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions

ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to the Track ID.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AEC7A38A-F684-40FC-B2F2-96000EBF22D8")]
public interface ITemporalObservationsTable2 : ITemporalObservationsTable, ITemporalTable
